name: 06-04-scene-setting-prose-mvp
title: Scene-setting prose and opening reader MVP
description: Implement a frontend-only MVP that helps visitors understand where they are, what is happening, and how to reply when entering a tavern or starting an NPC chat.
creator: lijin
next_action: Review visual screenshots with user/product owner.
If accepted, consider a follow-up owner-authored scene_digest contract instead of platform-authored summaries.
If long multi-NPC openings remain noisy, create a separate task to collapse non-selected NPC openers.
notes: Implemented frontend-only scene-setting prose MVP across native TavernChatWorkbench and legacy product entry/chat panels. Follow-up polish changed starter chips to fill the composer for user editing instead of auto-sending and added visible no-auto-send draft notes. Validation passed: typecheck, build, Playwright visual acceptance, and native starter behavior check with no chat POST. react-doctor was attempted but blocked because npx download/execute escalation was rejected by auto_review.
